summary: Core frontend pages (Auth/Plans/Payment/Panel) and Minecraft-themed purple/black styling were added, along with a UPI/QR payment UI and a hosting panel. However, the requested ID+password authentication with backend session handling and stable persistence is not implemented; instead, the diff uses Internet Identity and an authorization/admin-token system. Backend persistence (stable storage) is not evidenced, and generated static branding assets are referenced but not evidenced as added under the required public assets path.

missing_requirements.requirement: Authentication page with two modes: Register and Login using an ID (username/email) and Password; include an "Already logged in?" link that routes to Plans when a session exists; auto-route to Plans when authenticated.
missing_requirements.reason: AuthPage uses Internet Identity flow (via useInternetIdentity) and a profile-name setup, not ID/password Register+Login. No evidence of ID/password fields or an "Already logged in?" control tied to a backend session.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend support for ID/password authentication with session handling (register, login, logout, validate session) persisted in stable storage within backend/main.mo.
missing_requirements.reason: backend/main.mo shows access-control/permission checks and per-Principal accounts, but no methods for register/login/logout with ID+password, no session validation endpoint, and no evidence of stable variables for persistence across upgrades/reloads.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend order tracking: after payment completion, store purchased plan for the authenticated user and allow frontend to query the active plan on Page C.
missing_requirements.reason: Although purchasePlan/getPurchasedPlan exist, they are guarded by an authorization permission system rather than the requested ID/password session auth, and persistence across reloads/upgrades is not evidenced (no stable storage shown).

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate and include Minecraft-inspired static branding assets (logo + hero background) under frontend/public/assets/generated and use them in the UI (not served by backend).
missing_requirements.reason: UI references the required asset paths, but the diff summary does not show the actual image files being added under frontend/public/assets/generated (an omitted added file is mentioned, but its path/content is not evidenced).
evidence: File diff summary: "Omitted files due to limits: added=1"

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity-based authentication flow (AuthClient/DelegationIdentity) instead of ID/password auth.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest explicitly asks for ID/password auth and forbids third-party auth providers; diff implements Internet Identity login infrastructure.

hallucinated_features.description: Admin-token/authorization permission system with _initializeAccessControlWithSecret and admin-only getAllAccounts endpoint.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by any REQ; requirements only mention user ID/password auth, session validation, and per-user plan tracking.

hallucinated_features.description: Footer attribution link to caffeine.ai and inclusion of a heart symbol in user-facing footer.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by the BuildRequest (and adds extra user-facing content beyond specified pages/features).

hallucinated_features.description: Backend hosting plan catalog unrelated to the required four Minecraft plans (HEXO/METEOR/DOOMSDAY/XTREME).
hallucinated_features.reason: Requirements only specify the four plans on the frontend; backend adds domain/shared/vps/dedicated structures and packages not requested.
